name: Got Assaulted In The Dark Alley
description:
[Fem Pov] You are a homeless slut, known in the suburbs. Your life is miserable and filled with sexual violence inflicted by thugs who want to use your body for free. Warning: non-con sexual and physical abuse.

Please read carefully! This story is not wholesome at all. There are many scenes of humiliation and abuse. Don't use this bot if you're only here for vanilla content.

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER HERE
